description: Apply 5 UI adjustments: force badge text border color, harvest hex size/border, politics track slot hover z-index, turn popup button margin, and front layer figure positioning for 3 figures
steps: In src/App.css, find `.region-diorama-force-name` rule (around line 145). Change the text-shadow outline color from #fff to #333. The current text-shadow is: `-1px -1px 0 #fff,1px -1px 0 #fff,-1px 1px 0 #fff,1px 1px 0 #fff,0 0 6px currentColor,0 0 12px currentColor`. Change each `#fff` to `#333`.

In src/App.css, find `.harvest-hex` rule (line 23). Change `width:66px;height:66px` to `width:76px;height:76px`. Also change the filter from `drop-shadow(3px 0 0 rgba(0,0,0,0.6)) drop-shadow(-3px 0 0 rgba(0,0,0,0.6)) drop-shadow(0 3px 0 rgba(0,0,0,0.6)) drop-shadow(0 -3px 0 rgba(0,0,0,0.6))` to `drop-shadow(3px 0 0 #4A2800) drop-shadow(-3px 0 0 #4A2800) drop-shadow(0 3px 0 #4A2800) drop-shadow(0 -3px 0 #4A2800)` to create a dark brown border effect.

In src/App.css, find `.politics-track-slot.filled:hover` rule (line 7). Change `z-index:20` to `z-index:1200` and add `position:relative` to the rule. The current rule is `{transform:scale(1.5);z-index:20;box-shadow:0 4px 20px rgba(0,0,0,0.5)}`. It should become `{transform:scale(1.5);z-index:1200;position:relative;box-shadow:0 4px 20px rgba(0,0,0,0.5)}`.
In src/components/GameBoard.tsx, find the button with `marginTop: '-6px'` (line 558). Change it to `marginTop: '-11px'`.

In src/components/RegionDetailModal.tsx, around lines 522-541, modify the front layer logic. When `frontFigures.length === 3`, use `FRONT_OFFSETS = [-10, 40, -10]` and apply `justifyContent: 'space-between'` with `paddingLeft: '10px'` and `paddingRight: '10px'` to the container div so fig 1 is leftmost, fig 3 is rightmost, and fig 2 is slightly lower (centered between positions 2 and 3). When length is 4 (or other), keep the existing behavior with FRONT_OFFSETS = [-10, 40, 40, -10].
acceptance_criteria: Build passes with `npx vite build` without errors
The .harvest-hex is 76x76 pixels with dark brown (#4A2800) border drop-shadows
GameBoard.tsx turn popup button has marginTop '-11px'
RegionDetailModal.tsx front layer uses [-10, 40, -10] offsets and space-between layout when exactly 3 figures
verification: npx vite build completes without errors
